name: query-ast-types
description: Create foundational AST types by re-exporting @ucast/core types and defining custom type aliases
acceptanceCriteria: Defines QueryFilter type alias for MongoDB-style filter objects
Defines OperatorExpression type for comparison operators ($eq, $ne, $gt, $gte, $lt, $lte, $in, $nin, $regex, $contains)
Defines LogicalExpression type for logical operators ($and, $or, $not)
Defines SerializedCondition type for JSON-safe AST representation
All types are properly exported for external consumption
